overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a dark covered walkway with neon signs, transitioning to a waterfront promenade with a food cart vendor, and continuing along the water past parked buses and towering neon-lit buildings. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic quality and wet reflective surfaces.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered walkway at night, illuminated by neon signs including a prominent pink ramen shop sign. The path is paved with dark tiles and leads toward a brighter exit ahead. A few pedestrians are visible walking in the same direction through the corridor.

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open waterfront promenade with visible water and city skyline
camera moves past food cart and continues along waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing a food cart vendor on the left side

notable_agents.action: food cart vendor standing behind the cart serving customers

entered.detail: mobile food vendor cart with red and yellow umbrella and illuminated menu display
metal safety railing along the water's edge with green paint
dark water reflecting city lights and neon signs
tall cyberpunk buildings with illuminated advertisements and glass facades

segments.scene_description: Having exited the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a waterfront promenade at night. A food cart with a colorful umbrella occupies the left side while dark water stretches to the right. The camera moves past the vendor and continues along the wet reflective pavement, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible across the water and in the distance.

events.description: food cart exits view revealing extended waterfront and parked transit buses

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront walkway past parked buses and outdoor restaurant seating

entered.detail: row of blue and silver public transit buses parked along the street curb
red plastic chairs and tables outside a waterfront restaurant
elevated pedestrian walkway with bright green neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: Moving past the food cart, the promenade continues with parked buses on the left and the water on the right. The camera walks along the wet pavement, passing outdoor restaurant seating and approaching an elevated neon-lit bridge structure ahead. The cyberpunk cityscape rises in the background with towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit corridor into a sprawling, open-air cyberpunk waterfront. It begins by navigating a narrow covered walkway paved with dark tiles, passing pedestrians under the glow of a prominent pink ramen shop sign. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene opens onto a wide promenade where the lighting expands to reveal a food cart with a colorful umbrella and the dark, reflective surface of the adjacent water. The movement continues along the wet pavement, passing parked buses and outdoor restaurant seating while the horizon fills with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. The shot finally advances toward an elevated neon-lit bridge structure as the cityscape rises in an imposing display of light and architecture.
